summary.title: 记录 cxs 0.3.5 PR/CI readback
summary.what: 更新 2026-06-06 Claude Code source workflow 控制面，记录 PR #51、CI、npm registry 和本机 PATH cxs 的 live readback：PR 仍为 open draft，mergeStateStatus=CLEAN，无 reviews；CI run 27061046513 的 ci/test 成功；registry 与 PATH 安装态仍是 0.3.4。
summary.why: 0.3.5 release PR 已打开且 CI 通过，但完整目标还需要 review/merge、tag/release、npm registry 和本机安装态证据。把当前 live truth 写入 completion audit 与 milestone plan 可以防止把 checkout/PR 状态误报为已发布或已安装。

decisions.chose: 使用 gh pr view、gh run list、npm view、command -v/which -a/cxs --version 的 live readback 更新 workflow-state、completion-audit、milestone-plan 和 session-registry。
decisions.rationale: 这些命令分别证明 PR/CI、registry 和本机安装态，比旧的“已开 PR/CI 绿”摘要更可追溯。
rejected: 只保留笼统的 PR CI green 描述

decisions.chose: 明确记录 PR #51 仍为 draft/open，registry/PATH 仍是 0.3.4，不 merge、tag、release、install 或更新 global skill。
decisions.rationale: 当前证据只证明 review 前状态，不能证明 npm 发布或本机安装收口。
rejected: 把 PR CI green 当作 release complete
用本地 checkout 冒充已安装 0.3.5

rejected.reason: 本轮 active intent 是 PR/CI readback，workflow gate 仍要求后续 review/merge/release 证据；本提交只做证据记录。

acknowledged_constraints.note: completion audit 继续区分 checkout/source、PR/CI、npm registry、PATH CLI 和 global skill。
未执行 merge、tag、release、npm publish、installed CLI update 或 global skill update。

review_notes: Validation: git diff --check passed after the workflow document updates.
PR readback: gh pr view 51 returned state=OPEN, isDraft=true, mergeStateStatus=CLEAN, reviewDecision="", latestReviews=[].
CI readback: gh run list returned run 27061046513, workflow ci, event pull_request, headSha 209b2e85, status completed, conclusion success.
Registry/PATH readback: npm view @act0r/cxs version --json returned "0.3.4"; command -v cxs returned /Users/envvar/Library/pnpm/bin/cxs; cxs --version returned 0.3.4.

architectural_claims: Release/install truth remains separate from checkout source behavior and PR CI state.
behavioral_changes: Workflow control plane now records exact PR #51, CI run, registry, and PATH readback for the 0.3.5 release path.
security_implications: No credentials, publishing operation, installed CLI update, or global skill update was performed.
migration_notes: No product migration; release remains pending on PR review/merge, tag or release workflow, npm registry readback, and installed smoke.
